task_completion.description: The main_menu.xml file is updated with a search action item.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show main_menu.xml open in an editor with an <item> tag containing android:id="@+id/action_search" and an app:actionViewClass attribute set to a SearchView.

task_completion.description: EmployeeAdapter.kt is updated with dynamic filtering logic.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show EmployeeAdapter.kt open in an editor, containing a method (e.g., filter()) that takes a string query, performs a case-insensitive check against employee names, updates the displayed list, and calls notifyDataSetChanged().

task_completion.description: MainActivity.kt is updated to initialize the SearchView and listen for query changes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show MainActivity.kt open in an editor, overriding onCreateOptionsMenu, finding the action_search menu item, and setting an OnQueryTextListener that passes the query text to the adapter's filtering method.

task_completion.description: The app is successfully built and displays the search icon in the app bar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Android Emulator running the Employee Directory app with a magnifying glass search icon visible in the top app bar.

task_completion.description: The app demonstrates real-time filtering of the employee list based on a search query.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Android Emulator with the search bar expanded and text typed into it. The RecyclerView below should display a filtered subset of employees whose names match the typed query.

integrity.description: The agent used an IDE or text editor to modify the code.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show Android Studio or another text editor being used to edit the Kotlin and XML files, rather than just terminal commands echoing code.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual running application in the emulator.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Android Emulator running the compiled app with standard Android OS UI elements, and the agent clicking/typing into the search bar.

integrity.description: The filtering logic dynamically uses the search query rather than hardcoding a specific result.
integrity.visual_evidence: The code visible in EmployeeAdapter.kt uses the passed query variable for comparison (e.g., it.name.contains(query, ignoreCase = true)) instead of a hardcoded string.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is located at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/EmployeeDirectory. Verify modifications in three specific files: 1) app/src/main/res/menu/main_menu.xml must contain an item with ID action_search configured as a SearchView. 2) app/src/main/java/com/example/employeedirectory/EmployeeAdapter.kt must contain logic to filter the employee list by name (case-insensitive) and update the RecyclerView. 3) app/src/main/java/com/example/employeedirectory/MainActivity.kt must override onCreateOptionsMenu and implement an OnQueryTextListener to connect the SearchView to the adapter's filter method.
